items.title: You don't make a good skill by writing a skill. You make it by doing the thing, fixing it 20 times, then telling the AI to bottle up everything you just did.
items.title_original: You don't make a good skill by writing a skill. You make it by doing the thing, fixing it 20 times, then telling the AI to bottle up everything you just did.
items.title_en: You don't make a good skill by writing a skill. You make it by doing the thing, fixing it 20 times, then telling the AI to bottle up everything you just did.
items.title_zh: 你不会通过编写技能来获得好的技能。你要做的就是做这件事，修复它 20 次，然后告诉人工智能把你刚刚做的一切都封起来。
items.title_bilingual: 你不会通过编写技能来获得好的技能。你要做的就是做这件事，修复它 20 次，然后告诉人工智能把你刚刚做的一切都封起来。 / You don't make a good skill by writing a skill. You make it by doing the thing, fixing it 20 times, then telling the AI to bottle up everything you just did.
